author: doll-agent
content: Delete the 10 pairwise From<X> impls from chebyshev.rs, legendre.rs, hermite.rs, hermite_e.rs, laguerre.rs. ConvertBasis::convert<T>() (blanket-impl'd via ToPowerBasis + FromPowerBasis) already covers the same conversions through the canonical power-basis pivot. Verified no callers anywhere in the workspace use the bare ::from(X) form — only Self::from_power_basis() and .convert::<T>().
